title: Canopy Growth Confirms Canopy USA's Acquisition of Wana and Jetty
text: Canopy USA completed its acquisition of Wana and Jetty, with Canopy USA having closed the acquisitions of approximately 75% of the shares of Jetty and 100% of Wana. The completed acquisitions are expected to enable Canopy USA to realize significant financial benefits, including revenue growth and cost synergies across the Canopy USA ecosystem. Supply issues with Wana edibles impacted revenues by approximately CAD 3 million. Additionally, Canada adult-use cannabis declined 24% in part due to an interruption in the supply of Wana edibles. With the completed acquisition of Acreage Holdings by Canopy USA on December 9, 2024, Canopy USA has moved forward with full integration of Mountain High Products, Wana Wellness, The Cima Group, Jetty and Acreage, with such integration beginning to generate cost savings.
